high_school.focus_note: Master resume includes all activities; junior/senior years include extra detail.

activities.title: Key Club (Service Chair)
bullets: Planned monthly service events and coordinated volunteer sign-ups for 40+ students.
Tracked participation hours and maintained internal spreadsheets for officer reporting.

activities.title: Yearbook (Editor)
bullets: Managed deadlines for 10+ sections; coordinated content collection and final reviews.
Standardized layout templates and proofreading checklists to reduce last-minute revisions.

activities.title: Math Tutoring (Peer Tutor)
bullets: Provided weekly tutoring in algebra and statistics; created practice worksheets and review guides.
Helped students break down multi-step word problems and check solutions systematically.
Cleaned and joined marketing + transaction datasets in SQL to produce weekly reporting tables.
Built Tableau dashboards for campaign performance and customer segments, including drill-down views by channel and region.
Wrote Python scripts to automate data extraction and generate recurring summary reports for stakeholders.
Maintained and updated internal web tools used by student staff for scheduling and ticket tracking.
Implemented UI improvements and bug fixes based on user feedback; added small features to improve usability.
Documented common troubleshooting steps and contributed to onboarding materials for new student workers.
Supported front desk operations and helped students locate resources and resolve basic account issues.
Assisted staff with data entry and weekly circulation summaries.

research.focus_area: User studies and data-driven evaluation of interface changes
bullets: Helped design and run small user studies to evaluate interface changes and usability improvements.
Cleaned survey results and produced summary plots/tables to support research writeups.

artifacts.title: Evaluating Interface Changes with User Feedback

bullets: Built daily and hourly regression models for bike rental demand; compared baseline OLS to interaction and nonlinear extensions.
Used model selection (AIC/CV RMSE) and diagnostics to choose a final model; applied bootstrap to quantify uncertainty in key effects.
Designed a simple dashboard that summarizes volunteer sign-ups and event participation trends over time.
Implemented data cleaning rules and created visual summaries to support planning for future events.
Built a lightweight check-in workflow for small events with simple data export for attendance tracking.
Added basic validation to reduce duplicate entries and improve data quality.

leadership.title: Workshop Coordinator
bullets: Organized weekly skill-building workshops on SQL, data visualization, and project demos.
Coordinated speaker logistics and collected attendee feedback to improve future sessions.

awards.title: Undergraduate Project Award
awards.details: Recognized for a capstone project and presentation quality

publications_presentations.title: Evaluating Interface Changes with User Feedback

bullets: Helped run beginner computer literacy sessions; assisted with troubleshooting and guided practice activities.

metadata.notes: Master resume intentionally includes exhaustive content for downstream ranking/selection into tailored resumes.
